payload.text: Reviewer Agent score: plausibility 0.75 · evidence 0.55 · scope 0.80 · duplicate-risk 0.40. Plausible TREM2/plaque-morphology hypothesis with two concrete, falsifiable predictions in defined model systems. Concerns: Evidence span is a paraphrase, not a verbatim quote; Causal direction (compaction protective vs correlate) not fully disentangled; Cognitive decline endpoint in mice is hard to operationalize.
